case_title: DANIEL VALDEZ VS. JEROME RICHARDSON et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, JEROME INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA JEROME RICHARDSON PAINTING RICHARDSON, WANDA WILLIAMS INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY DBA JEROME RICHARDSON PAINTING $3,932.01 PRINCIPAL, $2.52 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,159.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
